rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved all six success criteria. It correctly identified and fixed every issue using only kubectl commands (no YAML file edits): unsuspended both jobs via `kubectl patch`, fixed the spark-monitor ImagePullBackOff by patching the image to `busybox:1.36`, updated the ConfigMap to set `spark.executor.memory=512m`, and rotated the expired secret. The spark-master and spark-worker deployments remained at 1/1 throughout. The oracle returned `pass`, and all 10 regression sweep stages also passed, confirming no regressions were introduced.
